detail.description: Max Schuemann singles on a line drive to left fielder Austin Martin. Jazz Chisholm Jr. to 2nd.
Max Schuemann homers (2) on a line drive to left center field. Ryan McMahon scores.
Max Schuemann singles on a ground ball to center fielder Daulton Varsho.
Max Schuemann doubles (1) on a ground ball to left fielder Sam Haggerty. Trent Grisham scores.
Max Schuemann singles on a line drive to right fielder Ryan Vilade.
Max Schuemann doubles (5) on a line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson.
Max Schuemann singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Ian Seymour.
Max Schuemann singles on a fly ball to center fielder Colton Cowser.
Max Schuemann doubles (2) on a fly ball to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Max Schuemann homers (1) on a fly ball to center field.
Max Schuemann singles on a line drive to center fielder Dylan Crews.
Max Schuemann doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Jesús Sánchez.
Max Schuemann doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom. Trent Grisham scores. Anthony Volpe scores.
